title: ［法律］我地可以用宗教理由豁免禁蒙面法

replies.msg:
從最近唔少消息，禁蒙面法應該係豁免宗教原因嘅
咁我就見到有巴打話創立蒙面神教，咁就等我同大家分享下香港法律上宗教嘅定義啦。

基本法保障宗教自由大家都知啦，但係咩叫宗教呢？
根據高等法院原訟庭 Chu Woan Chyi v Director of Immigration [2007] HKEC 553
Hartmann J 有如下定義：54-56

54. In Adelaide Company of Jehovah’s Witnesses Inc v. The Commonwealth (1943) 67 CLR 116, Lathan CJ observed that —
“It would be difficult, if not impossible, to devise a definition of religion which would satisfy the adherents of all the many and various religious which exist, or have existed, in the world.”

55. A religion, I think, needs to be something more than a set of shared ethical beliefs. But it does not, in my view, certainly not in the Asian context, demand a belief in the existence of God or any intelligent first cause. Among clearly recognised religious which do not teach what would generally be considered a belief in the existence of God are Buddhism and Taoism.

56. For present purposes, it is sufficient, I think, to adopt the guidelines of the High Court of Australia in Church of the New Faith v. Commissioner of Pay-Roll (1982) 154 CLR 120, per Wilson and Deane JJ at p.174 :
“ One of the more important indicia of ‘a religion’ is that the particular collection of ideas and/or practices involves belief in the supernatural, that is to say, belief that really extends beyond that which is capable of perception by the senses. If that be absent, it is unlikely that one has ‘a religion’. Another is that the ideas relate to man’s nature and place in the universe and his relation to things supernatural. A third is that the ideas are accepted by adherents as requiring or encouraging them to observe particular standards or codes of conduct or to participate in specific practices having supernatural significance. A fourth is that, however loosely knit and varying in beliefs and practices adherents may be, they constitute an identifiable group or identifiable groups.”

簡單黎講，宗教有如下條件：
1. 單純嘅道德規範或觀念不足以成為宗教
2. 不需要一個超自然嘅神/智慧生命
3. 要有伸延至感官之外的信念
4. 內容有關人類在宇宙中的本質和定位
5. 有一套要遵從嘅codes
6. 無論幾分散都好，要組成到一個或數個可identify嘅group

要記住極權如何打壓香港示威：
1.抹黑：利用少部分的暴力衝突而將全部示威者形容為「邪惡」、示威=港獨、新華社、環球時報、人民日報
2.誤導：警總救護車、雷射槍、9吋尖刀等等
3.滲透：5毛、陳雲、黃x民、譚香文
4.假民意/曲解民意：主流民意是......
5.5毛輿論-分化、負面、fake news、煽動手足做負效益/低效益工作
6.強迫企業自我審查
7.出動黑社會、愛國暴徒
8.扮示威者：(負面的)破壞eg.遊行
9.嫁禍示威者/黑警：打議員打記者打女仔
10.扮好人/扮對話：「江山易改本性難移」
11.警察濫權、濫捕、暴力執法、恐嚇
12.利用親中人士發表「假」權威言論
13.用盡手段打壓反對聲音
14.矮化示威者為甲由、yellow object
諗到再加
